turns.userMessage: Write a very detailed analysis of the entire workbook

content.text:
# Comprehensive Workbook Analysis

## Sales Sheet

The Sales sheet contains quarterly revenue data for three products across four quarters. Widget A leads with $54,800 in total revenue, followed by Widget B at $39,700 and Widget C at $27,300.

## Growth Trends

All products show positive growth trajectories with Widget C showing the strongest momentum at 50% year-over-year growth. This suggests a market shift toward...
